briefing.title: 005 Warehouse District
briefing.text: Interior room/cutaway receipt map loaded through mission runtime. This proves the mission layer can use the warehouse map without breaking rooms, roofs, wall fade, or indoor pilot combat.

lines.name: Biggs
lines.text: Warehouse lights are dead. Someone wanted this place quiet.

lines.name: Mara
lines.text: Quiet just means they expect us to listen before we bleed.

lines.name: Mission Control
lines.text: Dialogue HUD mode active. Advance with Enter or Space.

lines.name: Mara
lines.text: Warehouse secure. Whatever they were hiding, they left tracks.

lines.name: Mara
lines.text: We lost the room. Pull back before the building eats the rest of us.

victory.title: Victory
victory.text: Warehouse secured. Return to mission select or title.

defeat.title: Defeat
defeat.text: Warehouse operation failed. Return to mission select or title.
